ab: Kakeriden no singsi kamo a tayra i lotok anini.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去山上。
en: I will take you to the mountains today.

ab: Adihayay ko likes i lotok saan ci ina.
ch: B:媽媽說山上有很多蚊子
en: Mom says that there are lots of mosquitoes in the mountains.

ab: Kakeriden no singsi kamo a tayra i omah anini.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去田裡。
en: I will take you to the fields.

ab: Mamikarkar kita to sera haw?
en: Are we going to loosen the soil?

ab: Tatalacowa kita anini?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: Kakeriden no singsi kita tayra i ’alo.
en: Teacher will take us to the riverside.

ab: Tatalacowa kita anini?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: Kakeriden no singsi kita a tayra i lotok.
en: Teacher will take us to the mountains today.

ab: Tatayra kita i ’alo anini haw?
en: Are we going to the riverside today?

ab: Cowa, kakeliden no singsi kita tayra i tokos.
ch: B:不是，老師要帶我們去山上。
en: No, our teacher is going to take us to the mountains.

ab: Tatayra kita i tokos anini haw?
en: Are we going to the mountains today?

ab: Cowa, tatayra kita i omah anini.
ch: B:不是，我們今天要去田裡。
en: No, we are going to the fields.

ab: Singsi, o maan ko nanengnengen no mita i ’alo?
ch: A:老師，我們到河邊要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see at the riverside?

ab: Minengnenng kita to tompo.
en: We are going to see dragonflies.

ab: Singsi, o maan ko nanengnengen no mita i tokos?
ch: A:老師，我們到山上要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see in the mountains?

ab: Minengnenng kita to ’adipangpang.
en: We are going to see butterflies.

ab: Singsi, mimaan kita tayra i omah?
en: What are we going to do in the fields?

ab: Maminengneng kita toya nipalomaan no mita a ’ariray, na’onen yo adihayay ko kakonah ato fitengal.
ch: B:我們要到田裡看我們種的玉米，要小心有螞蟻、蜜蜂唷!
en: We are going to see the corn we grow in the fields, but you need to be aware of the ants and bees.

ab: Singsi, tatayra kita i ’alo a midangoy haw?
ch: A:老師我們要到河邊游泳嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to swim in the river?

ab: Cowa, maminengneng kita to tompo.
en: No, we are going to see dragonflies.

ab: Singsi, papaloma kita to dateng i omah haw?
ch: A:老師我們要到田裡種菜嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to grow some vegetables in the fields?

ab: Mamikarkar kita to sera anini.
en: We are going to loosen the soil today.

ab: Iraay ko misaefeeferay a tompo i tira.
en: There are dragonflies flying around.

ab: Anini paka’araw kako to ma’oripay a tompo.
ch: B:我今天才看過真正活著的蜻蜓。
en: Today is the first time I see real living dragonflies.

ab: Iraay ko misaefeeferay a ’adipangpang i tira.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: Yey! Wa! Maolahay kako to’adipangpang, makapahay.
ch: B:耶! 哇! 我喜歡蝴蝶，很漂亮。
en: Yeh! Wow! I love butterflies. They are very beautiful.

ab: Iraay ko misaefeeferay a ’adipangpang i tira.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: Cowa ko ’adipangpang kora, o fitengal kora.
en: Those are not butterflies. They are bees.

ab: Itini to a minengneng, aka ka tayra i raay a pala yo!
ch: A:在這裡看一看，不要到太遠的地方唷!
en: Come here and take a look. Don’t go too far!

ab: Hai, cowa ko tatayra i raay kami.
ch: B:好，我們不會去太遠的地方。
en: Got it, we won’t go anywhere too far.

ab: Aka a kacomikay, tayoen ko rakat mapolinaw.
ch: A:不要用跑的，慢慢走免得跌倒了。
en: Don’t run and walk slowly lest you fall down.

ab: Halikien ako nga manengneng sanay kako.
en: I want to see them right away.
